prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt) forged internals: Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons with moly-coated skirts for 35+ psi boost resilience

Turbocharger upgrade: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 82mm exducer), TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, and custom 3-inch divorced downpipe with Vibrant 1799 ultra-quiet resonator

Fuel system: Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, Radium Engineering dual catch can setup, and AEM 380LPH external fuel pressure regulator with -6AN hardlines and Earl's Pro-Lite 350 fittings
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (2000-2005 specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, overfenders, and duckbill rear wing, all painted in Mitsubishi 'Pyrenees Black' with custom 'GSX' side decals in 3M Scotchlite reflective vinyl

Voltex Type-3 rear diffuser with integrated quad 3.5-inch titanium exhaust tips (custom fabricated by Burns Stainless), paired with a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a 3-inch cowl induction scoop and functional NACA ducts

OEM+ interior: Recaro SRD-E bucket seats with custom Mitsubishi 'Diamond White' Alcantara inserts, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay with custom 3D-printed gauge pods for AEM X-Series wideband and boost gauges
